sections.paragraph:
Original: מטה מטא

Transliteration: meṭâ' meṭâh

Phonetic: met-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to reach, come upon, attain
    1. (Peal)
      1. to reach, come to
      2. to reach, extend
      3. to come upon

Origin: apparently corresponding to H4672 in the intransitive sense of being found present

TWOT entry: 2825

Part(s) of speech: Verb
